commands.review_summary:
The branch imports the existing runtime-policy session-key resolver into auto-reply session reset cleanup and adds a regression test asserting direct-DM `/new` cleanup includes the peer-scoped key.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +45. Total +59 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main derives a peer-scoped runtime-policy key for direct DMs but reset cleanup only passes the old session id and canonical key. I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
